---
title: "Publications"
---

## Research output

My full publication list is available on [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Jade_Maggs) and [Scopus](https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=55250227800).

| | |
|---|---|
| Peer-reviewed journal articles | 24 |
| Technical reports | 81 |
| Conference presentations | 22 |
| Working group presentations | 21 |
| Book sections | 1 |
| Popular articles | 16 |
| **Scopus h-index** | **13** |

## Research themes

My published work spans three main areas:

**Recreational fisheries**  
Survey design, harvest estimation, and CPUE standardisation for inshore finfish and rock lobster fisheries in South Africa and New Zealand.

**Fish movement and behaviour**  
Acoustic telemetry studies on the movement of coastal reef fish species in southern Africa, including implications for MPA design and fisheries management.

**Marine protected areas**  
Monitoring fish assemblages in MPAs, evaluating MPA effectiveness, and contributing to MPA network design processes.

## Selected publications

*A selection of key papers — see ResearchGate for the full list.*

<!-- Add individual papers here as needed, e.g.:
**Maggs, J.Q.** et al. (2020). Title of paper. *Journal Name*, 00(0), 000--000. [DOI](https://doi.org/...)
-->

[View full list on ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Jade_Maggs){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
